name: Smoothed & Normalized CKS OFI
hypothesis: Previous OFI signals (iter002, iter006) failed due to inconsistency. The OFI cheatsheet suggests aggregation and normalization are critical. This signal uses a rolling mean to smooth the noisy raw ofi_cks_1 and a z-score to normalize it, which should produce a more robust flow-based signal.
mutation_note: Prior OFI signals were inconsistent. This spec applies best practices from the OFI cheatsheet by first smoothing the raw OFI with a rolling mean and then standardizing it with a z-score to create a more robust feature.
